name: gemini-llm-council
description: Gemini CLI Extension - Multi-LLM Council with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint + Gemini OAuth

settings.name: Custom OpenAI Base URL
settings.description: Base URL for any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. https://api.groq.com/openai/v1, http://localhost:11434/v1)

settings.name: Custom OpenAI API Key
settings.description: API key for custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint

settings.name: Gemini OAuth Tokens
settings.description: For Gemini Pro subscription (after OAuth login)
